zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sutton於大約1498年出生在英國斯塔福爾杜德利。她於1513年與John Hudleston在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1532年在英國藍卡爾聖 米可艾爾也斯 奧 維享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sutton was born about 1498, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England. She married John Hudleston in 1513, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1532, in St Michael's on Wyre, Lancashire, England, at the age of 35.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Suttonは約1498年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーで生まれた。1513年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーでJohn Hudlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1532年にイギリスランカシュアイアスト ミチャエル'ス オン ウイアで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sutton(은)는 대략 1498년 영국 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1513년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 John Hudleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1532년 영국 랭카실르 스트 믹하얼'스  윈이르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.
